description: Worqen escrow program — devnet deployment manifest. Canonical source for program ID, upgrade authority, and keypair paths used by CI/deploy scripts and off-chain services.

upgrade_authority.notes: v2 deployer wallet. v1.1 used DTVG8EyJu5c9UJexVwRrGPegddMDrSA9Nt1Fne4shPrs as upgrade authority — that program ID still exists at GVST6WJqsj1BmFSRy1a9Xi2DK8BZtzjiFGkjQCRSmaUW for legacy escrows. For CI, load via SOLANA_UPGRADE_AUTHORITY_KEYPAIR secret or use a dedicated MPC/HSM for mainnet.

legacy.note: v1.1 program is still live at the legacy ID for any in-flight v1 escrows. New escrows use the v2 program ID at the top of this file.

notes: Fresh program ID — clean cutover from v1.1 (no in-place upgrade). v1.1 escrows continue on the old program ID.
Account schema v2: same fields as v1, new semantics.
Critical security fixes: token destination/mint constraints across all token instructions; SOL drain-actual-balance defends against dust DoS; init_if_needed for employee ATAs unblocks 0-SOL workers.

Logical fixes: employer-cancel locked after Funded; worker self-release when both confirmed; worker dispute locked in PendingRelease; dispute_deadline mandatory and capped to 90 days; partial-release cumulative-delta commission math; rent-exempt safety check on partials; auto-release simplified to Disputed-state-only; authority rotation blocked while Disputed.
New instructions: close_escrow_sol and close_escrow_token (refund storage rent on terminal escrows).

Error codes added: 6024 DisputeLockedAfterConfirm, 6025 DisputeDeadlineRequired, 6026 DisputeDeadlineTooLong, 6027 EmployerCancelAfterFundedDisallowed, 6028 AuthorityRotationDuringDispute, 6029 EscrowNotTerminal, 6030 AutoReleaseTooFar, 6031 IsNativeMintMismatch, 6032 PartialReleaseLeavesDust, 6033 VaultNotEmpty.
Heavy token contexts boxed (Box<Account<'info, T>>) to keep BPF stack frames under 4096 bytes.
Additive: two new instructions for the non-escrow direct-pay flow — pay_with_commission_sol and pay_with_commission_token.
No account struct changes (the new instructions are stateless). All v1 escrow accounts remain valid.
New event: DirectPaymentMade (indexer-only; no state persisted on-chain for direct pay).
Program data account NOT extended — v1's +150KB extend left enough headroom (v1.1 .so is ~494KB, allocation is 518KB).

Account schema v1: added version, escrow_group_id, sequence_in_group, total_in_group, released_to_employee, auto_release_at, dispute_raised_by/at, dispute_deadline, dispute_resolved_by/at, employee/employer_share_resolved, cancellation_reason, cancelled_by fields.
Modified signatures: create_escrow (+4 params), raise_dispute (+1 param), cancel_escrow_*_token (+reason).
Pre-upgrade v0 escrow accounts are now unreadable — wipe from backend DB before serving traffic.
Program data account extended by 150000 bytes before upgrade to fit the grown bytecode (v0 ~368KB -> v1 ~466KB, new allocation 518KB).

related_wallets_on_devnet.description: Convenience wallets pre-provisioned in ~/.config/solana/local-wallets/ used by local integration tests. Not part of the program; listed here so dev scripts can find them.

constants.usdt_mint_devnet_note: Tether has no devnet mint; we alias USDT->USDC on devnet. See MULTI_CHAIN_ARCHITECTURE.md §6.5.

post_deploy_checklist: Set ESCROW_PROGRAM_ID=GDCBqN8AVU5i2xXdeTNwBmCCsd9Y8rfiH1JDKA8UjDYh in backend .env (and any deployment env vars).
Frontend IDL has been replaced (frontend/apps/dashboard/lib/solana-wallet/idl/worqen_escrow.json) with v2 — verify next deploy ships it.

Backend custodial_signing.py has v2 builders for resolve_dispute_*, trigger_auto_release_*, close_escrow_*. Restart Celery worker + beat to pick up new tasks: disputes.force_resolve_expired (hourly) and escrows.close_terminal (daily).
v1.1 program at GVST6WJqsj1BmFSRy1a9Xi2DK8BZtzjiFGkjQCRSmaUW remains live for legacy escrows. After all v1 escrows finalize, v1.1 can be unpinned.
Tests in solana/tests/worqen-escrow.ts were written against v1; cancel-after-funded test will fail under v2. Update or rewrite before next CI run.
